overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through rain-soaked streets with towering glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and elevated walkways. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, palm trees, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a high-tech urban environment with overcast, hazy lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to metal slatted barrier approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking behind three pedestrians along a wet sidewalk next to a tall metal slatted wall, approaching a street intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead, one holding a colorful umbrella

entered.detail: tall metal barrier with horizontal slats running along the right side of the walkway
tall glass and steel towers with neon accents visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection ahead
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines visible across the wet street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk next to a metal slatted wall, following three pedestrians toward an intersection. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background through the hazy rain, with palm trees lining the street and traffic lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection crosswalk with elevated circular walkway structure

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the wet street at the marked crosswalk
futuristic truck and other vehicles drive past on the wet road while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the crosswalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic armored truck driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian with umbrella crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large circular elevated pedestrian walkway structure spanning across the intersection
various futuristic cars and trucks moving along the wet streets

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide wet street at the crosswalk, passing through moderate pedestrian traffic. A prominent circular elevated walkway dominates the intersection overhead while futuristic vehicles drive past on the rain-slicked roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards and palm tree landscaping

events.description: reaches the opposite curb and turns left to walk along the sidewalk next to a building with large digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a large commercial building featuring glowing digital advertisements and billboards, with palm trees lining the street

notable_agents.action: woman with a glowing holographic umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large modern building with massive glowing digital screens displaying advertisements on multiple sides

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a commercial sidewalk beside a building covered in large digital billboards. Palm trees line the path and the wet concrete reflects the neon lights from the advertisements and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban promenade with glass facades and elevated walkways

events.description: passes close by a woman with a glowing umbrella who temporarily blocks part of the view

agents.ego_description: continuing down the palm-lined sidewalk, passing various pedestrians with umbrellas and futuristic clothing, with glass buildings on the left

notable_agents.action: woman with glowing umbrella passing closely by the camera
person in green outfit walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern white and glass facade building with reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined promenade with modern glass buildings on the left and the street on the right. Various pedestrians with glowing umbrellas pass by, including a close encounter with a woman carrying a holographic umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban canyon with elevated transit walkways and towering skyscrapers

events.description: approaching the next intersection with crosswalk markings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic urban canyon with towering glass skyscrapers and elevated walkways overhead, approaching another street intersection

notable_agents.action: couple walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: upcoming street intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a futuristic urban canyon with massive glass skyscrapers rising on both sides and elevated walkways spanning overhead. The sidewalk continues past palm trees toward the next intersection, with the cityscape extending into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that evolves from a narrow sidewalk into a towering urban canyon. It begins beside a metal slatted wall, following pedestrians toward an intersection where futuristic skyscrapers loom through the hazy rain. As the camera crosses the wide, wet street, the view opens up beneath a prominent circular elevated walkway while vehicles glide across the slick pavement. The scene then shifts toward a commercial promenade, passing under massive digital billboards and glowing holographic umbrellas that reflect neon light onto the wet concrete. Finally, the path leads deeper into the city, flanked by massive glass skyscrapers and overhead walkways that stretch toward a distant, hazy horizon.
